data.title: Microservices
data.description: Adobe utilizes a microservices architecture to efficiently manage its diverse range of services and applications.
data.technical_spec: Deployed via Docker containers orchestrated through Kubernetes.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Employs CDN to optimize load times and provide a global reach for its media-rich content.
data.technical_spec: Akamai CDN integration for enhanced content delivery and caching.

data.title: High-Availability Systems
data.description: Ensures consistent uptime and performance through redundant systems and failover mechanisms.
data.technical_spec: Uses AWS cloud services with multi-region deployments.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Provides an API gateway for secure and efficient API management.
data.technical_spec: Built on Node.js and integrated with OAuth 2.0 for authentication.

data.title: Serverless Computing
data.description: Leverages serverless frameworks for handling certain background tasks and events.
